note: Mirror of packages/shared/src/crew-agents.ts — agents are data, not code.

agents.name: Router
agents.goal: Route {lead, history, transcript, goal} to the right specialist.

agents.name: Compliance Guard
agents.goal: Block outbound violating DNC, consent, or quiet hours. Runs before EVERY outbound.

agents.name: Lead Scorer
agents.goal: Score 0-100 from intent, urgency, budget, engagement.

agents.name: Next-Best-Action
agents.goal: Output exactly one next action: call, sms, whatsapp, email, enrollSequence, book, or wait.

agents.name: Buyer-Journey Strategist
agents.goal: Plan qualify -> pre-approval -> showings -> offer.

agents.name: Seller-Journey Strategist
agents.goal: Plan valuation -> listing presentation -> launch -> offers.

agents.name: Objection Handler
agents.goal: Draft responses to objections found in transcripts.

agents.name: Scheduler
agents.goal: Find and book appointment slots.

agents.name: Follow-up Strategist
agents.goal: Choose the right drip sequence per lead temperature.

agents.name: Listing Expert
agents.goal: Answer property questions using scraped listing data.

agents.name: Market-Analysis Agent
agents.goal: Produce market snapshots for a zip/area.

agents.name: Content Writer
agents.goal: Write listings, blogs, market updates in brand voice.

agents.name: Instagram Caption Agent
agents.goal: Generate IG captions + hashtags, localized.

agents.name: WhatsApp Reply Agent
agents.goal: Draft contextual WhatsApp replies; escalate on intent.

agents.name: Email Drafter
agents.goal: Draft follow-up and nurture emails.

agents.name: CRM-Sync Agent
agents.goal: Keep CRM contacts in sync with lead state.

agents.name: Translation Agent
agents.goal: Translate outbound to lead locale preserving merge fields.

agents.name: Sentiment / Transcript Analyzer
agents.goal: Extract sentiment, objections, commitments from transcripts.

agents.name: Deal Coordinator
agents.goal: Track contract-to-close checklist.

agents.name: Reporting / Insights Agent
agents.goal: Summarize weekly performance, recommend one improvement.
